sqlMap.select: select * from FirmAnnualRevenueLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into FirmAnnualRevenueLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey ClientNameForAnnlRevenue PercentageOfAnnlRevenue ServicesRendered LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #ClientNameForAnnlRevenue# #PercentageOfAnnlRevenue# #ServicesRendered# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('FirmAnnualRevenueLW') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select FirmAnnualRevenueKey, ClientNameForAnnlRevenue, PercentageOfAnnlRevenue, ServicesRendered, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from FirmAnnualRevenueLW where FirmAnnualRevenueKey = #FirmAnnualRevenueKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update FirmAnnualRevenueLW set
ClientNameForAnnlRevenue = #ClientNameForAnnlRevenue# ClientNameForAnnlRevenue = null PercentageOfAnnlRevenue = #PercentageOfAnnlRevenue# PercentageOfAnnlRevenue = null ServicesRendered = #ServicesRendered# ServicesRendered = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where FirmAnnualRevenueKey = #FirmAnnualRevenueKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from FirmAnnualRevenueLW where FirmAnnualRevenueKey = #FirmAnnualRevenueKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from FirmAnnualRevenueLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select FirmAnnualRevenueKey, ClientNameForAnnlRevenue, PercentageOfAnnlRevenue, ServicesRendered, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from FirmAnnualRevenueLW where FirmAnnualRevenueKey = #FirmAnnualRevenueKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select FirmAnnualRevenueKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, ClientNameForAnnlRevenue, PercentageOfAnnlRevenue, ServicesRendered, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from FirmAnnualRevenueLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
